assertions.title: Sign in with email and password

steps.action: Navigate to /auth/signup to create test account
steps.observed: Signup form with Email, Password fields and Sign Up button displayed

steps.action: Fill signup form with unique email (test+71679b8b-fcfc-485d-ba85-ce876f513d9b@example.com) and password (TestPassword123!)

steps.expected: Signed out and redirected to landing page

steps.observed: Signin form with Email, Password fields and Sign In button displayed

steps.action: Fill signin form with same credentials
steps.observed: Email and password fields filled with test credentials
Successfully redirected to /dashboard, Sign Out button visible in header

steps.action: Sign in to create authenticated session (already signed in from VAL-AUTH-003)
steps.observed: On /dashboard with authenticated session (Sign Out button visible)

steps.action: Take screenshot showing authenticated state before refresh
steps.expected: Screenshot shows dashboard with Sign Out button in header
steps.observed: Pre-refresh screenshot captured showing authenticated state

steps.expected: Sign Out button still visible, no redirect to signin
steps.observed: Sign Out button present in header, dashboard content visible

steps.action: Take screenshot showing authenticated state after refresh
steps.expected: Screenshot shows same authenticated state as before
steps.observed: Post-refresh screenshot captured showing authenticated state preserved

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-AUTH-003: Sign in with email and password works correctly - user is redirected to dashboard after signin with authenticated state visible. VAL-AUTH-005: Session persists across page refreshes - user remains authenticated and on dashboard after hard reload.
